_description: Location registry. Each location is a distinct physical space. Time-of-day conditions are modelled as 'variants' within a location, not as separate entries.

locations.name: String (e.g., The Cozy Café)
locations.lighting_summary: String (lighting description, e.g., warm pendant overhead)

shots.label: String (e.g., Wide — from entrance)
shots.description: String (visual layout of this specific camera setup)
shots.prompt_suffix: String (diffusion prompt suffix detailing the shot layout)

locations.name: String (e.g., The Office)
locations.description: String (overall physical description of the location)

variants.label: String (e.g., Morning)
variants.description: String (visual and mood differences for this variant/time)

shots.label: String (e.g., Wide — from entrance)
shots.description: String (visual layout of this shot under these variant conditions)
shots.prompt_suffix: String (diffusion prompt suffix for this variant shot)
